songs.name: Crescendo
songs.lyrics:
I saw a drop fall from the milk of her eyes
Neith swam out from it's ripples
And she wove the space into an arrow that shot through the sun

The bang could be heard from inside the belly of Cygnus
Champagne disturbed the endless blackness
For the first time there was light, and from it came music and the only child of love

Our overlords watch and ponder, study us like ants
Do they wait for us in a supernova to join celestial court
If they laughed out loud, we wouldn't hear them over the cauldron's rolling boil
To sail towards abyss and be devoured next to gods
I sit on a rock, my future not too far
I squeeze her tight to keep her warm
Lets talk for hours about the things we can't imagine while our atoms disintegrate

Somewhere there's a love that's unconditional
Somewhere there's forgiveness for you
But what spell have you cast on me to cause me to see stars
What notes do you play to lift my strings up to mars
Sing to me
Sing with me
Scream my shitty poems

Sing to me
Sing with me
Scream my shitty poems
Goodbye, Jade. My heart only has room for one
Goodbye, Saturn. Your rings don't impress me anymore
Goodbye, Neptune. I'm sick of the ice in my veins
Hello, Gabrielle. Did I do the music proud
Hello, new century. What will my chisel chip today
Hello stardust, and the lady David dressed as to bring the band back together

I will be indomitable

songs.name: Hippie girl
songs.lyrics:
Hippie girl, hippie girl, peace and love and love
The key to staying skinny; do Rohypnol and throw up
Hippie girl, hippie girl, thanks for loving me
And everything you've ever loved is ridden with disease
Ph'nglui mglw'nafh Cthulhu R'lyeh wgah'nagl fhtagn

First they wear black shirts, now they wear red hats
You fell for the propaganda and now I am currently contemplating the best way to waste the rest of my life, waiting around until the day I die
I know, I think I might write a song. I'll guarantee everyone will get the meaning wrong
And I'll write a bass that goes doodoodoodoodoodoo cause I have no patients

Steal from the rich and give to the poor. Your daddy doesn't care, that's what his wallet's for
Make sure it's on video so everyone can see that you're oh so cool and chill, and you have no personality
Ph'nglui mglw'nafh Cthulhu R'lyeh wgah'nagl fhtagn

I have no idea how to play guitar
And I'm sick of acting like I can
Uhh
Fuck this shit, Scott take a solo

"I'm not a hero" he cries from the cliff tops, as the war drags on down below
Missiles rain on a beast named Apathy, and eldritch horror that stands to stare god in the eye
With swords for scales and magma breath
You see your reflection in the whites of it's eyes
All the soldiers pray to have peace one day, but they keep throwing rocks in the sky

There lives a man who seems content living his life unsupervised, no audience
Is he to blame for your despair? Growing up he was taught that this world is unfair
I'm going home I'm going home
I'm going I'm going I'm going I'm going
I'm going home I'm going home I'm going home I'm going home
You can all scream out until your lungs pop, but when you're staring down it's throat
Into an abyssal sized stomach, soon you're shell shocked
A revolution's been raring to go
But if we don't start now then we never will
I'm convinced you're content in a cage
Just another pig in makeup
Or mouse in a maze being fed by the palm through a haze

Hippie girl, hippie girl, peace and love and love
I'll sell my soul if push comes to shove
Hippie girl, hippie girl, thanks for loving you
And none of it was real because none of it was true

songs.name: Swamped
songs.lyrics:
Sure I could stay here in this beach town where the dogs get high off the smoke in the breeze
Or I could drive this lovely lady down to the Oregon sea
Maybe I'll go tell all those rich white pricks to go and kick themselves
On second thought those pricks they're my family and I need them
They patched me up when I was beaten
Lover take my hand there's a world I wanna show you, but a sacrifice is sure to be made
It's pointless to worry, no need to hurry
I'm two kids in a trench coat, sneak into the show
Here comes a key change

Lately it seems that I just can't quite write the songs I like because you are on my mind
I have dreams of sprawling epics that will never reach the page
Instead all I've got are poems for you, poems for you
Poems for you, yeah poems for you
Sure, she looks fine through the eyes of a sailor, cast off the land in search for the world's edge
Oh, the words she whispered to me, they gave me a whole new feeling I ain't never felt before
Oh, c'mon honey. Won't you let me here you sing to me
I could melt in that voice

My mind's like a piece of wood drifting out on the long, long horizon
I just can't quite sew the words right
Soon I'll sink into a sleep and have dreams of her arms around me
I wanna play it cool, but I want her to be with me

Lover take my hand, there's a world I wanna show you, but a sacrifice is sure to be made
Yeah why must I worry, I'm in no hurry
We're boys in men's clothes and we beg to explode

songs.name: The Modern Day American Witch
songs.lyrics:
Don't make her bend to your religion
She knows the rapture's past, now the devil reigns
A doctor of the natural science
When Earth has so much beauty, who needs faith
A philosopher that's most absurdist
Enough to strike confusion in Dali
Like Nicks was possessed by Rhiannon
All horrors hide inside, my fear shalt not speak

This witch can brew a storm in a bottle
Tarot cards, herbs, oils, crystals, transcribe my dreams

Was I too naïve, too enchanted
Or have her lips been laced with cocaine
Come conjure spells by candle lit darkness
And cast a curse upon the high class pigs
This cowboy got lost in the forest
Though I'll say the stars are nice, I think I'll stay
Get high with me and tell me secrets
Swim with me through the cosmos, dance in outer space
Her dark curls hypnotized me
I wanna drink her elixir and smoke her weed

Oh, she's gonna cast a spell on you, boy
You better run for your life
She's coming after you, girl
The queen of the night time

songs.name: A Walk to Egypt
songs.lyrics:
He's going to Egypt to look for gold
But the Oracle lied, there's no way to unfold
This tale of love is one-sided at best
Don't forget the wind whispers back what she said
But when the wind sings, she's sincere
Where the sun shines, calamity draws near

I pray for disaster to sweep me away
I'm afraid of the empty that'll catch me someday
Now I walk to Egypt by foot through the sand
It hurts to leave it all behind

My mind walks towards the siren, but he the shepherd knows there's nothing to control

I've ignored this love for far too long, I've been searching for something I've already stumbled upon

songs.name: 8am in November
songs.lyrics:
Chevy pickup truck go for a drive down the 11
From Mission to Abby, over the bridge Highway 11
Deliver this package to Matsqui prison
And when that sky turns gold I'll forget how to hate
And Garcia will sing to me
Then I'll drive same way back. It's a cloudy morning in November

Frozen dew on the lawn. Warm up the engine before I go
While the dawn is still dark out, scrape off the ice before I go
Is this the sun that George wrote all his songs about
As It belts out a major chord light pierces through my eye, and my skin all turns to steam before I float up to the sky

Still not worth the price of gas, but that's an unfair comparison

songs.name: 2 Chords
songs.lyrics:
Can you hear me, can you feel me
I can feel you still
Is it still raining, is there any complaining
Left to do up there
Are you glad to be reunited with your boy, or are you sad that it's too soon
It feels like not a day has past. I still hear your frail laugh. So we drink today with you

Did they come today, wish you good health today while between teeth pray on your fall
Another dollar, you and your father cough up for the home you built with your own hands
The poor old hermit sits in his lonely home
Has time forgotten and moved on
Do the years pass like seconds at this point
Have you grown numb to the punches at this point
When it's your turn we'll cry like newborns

The least deserving of fate disturbing are hunted by bad luck it seems
Oh, the stories of your old glories, were they as swollen as your cells
All I hear is of how much we could have shared
Your daughters miss you everyday
God, fill my selfish desires. Keep your dirty mits off of these angels on earth
So I wear your ring today

songs.name: Klee Wyck
songs.lyrics:
My white whale, the Klee Wyck
I saw her snicker at me
That undead doe grew moss on her back
Her exposed ribs were filled with flowers
Flesh hanging onto her bones by a thread
Each hoof print left in the grass
Burned in a blue will-o-wisp before disappearing
Vanished in a bush I've been mocked by a wendigo
Crazy I'm called, drinking too much they say
So long ago, maybe I dreamed it after all
But the others seen it too lost in the woods one night
It's out there laughing at us for believing
Spend our lives hunting
Conceding will kill you inside
Grab your spears, lads. And two pints to go
Fight, bleed for all you believe in
Oh we'll prove them wrong, and I'll be the laughing one
For we rather be martyrs than fools

albums.name: Everyone Is Stupid Except For Me 2024

songs.name: NOT ANOTHER ROCKSTAR
songs.lyrics:
Oh joy, sound the bells, today is great
Here comes the man of my dreams with a bitch on a chain
Hes not just any other rockstar
He's so much better than any other rockstar
Ooh lala oh my my
Please take my money and spit in my eye

I'm the reason there's an us and a them
Because I wouldn't dare compare myself to you anywhere
I thank god you chose this occupation
Rather than a nurse, teacher, trades person, or any of the many jobs in high demand that higher with minimal requirements
Surly we don't need any of those

Oshi look at me, daisuki
All just for you I have learned Japanese
Because she's not just any other idol
She's so much better than any other idol
Oh lala oh mymy
Never once are you allowed to have sex in your life

Say goodbye to all your creativity
If you dont follow a trend it's a means to an end
You're a slave to the heirarchy
And they don't give a shit if I know where you live
Who says its wrong
It's just culture shock

songs.name: A Monkey's Wedding
songs.lyrics:
The sunrise in the morning
It's a little low for a September day
She goes crossing
A little high for mid July
And she steps out in the pooring rain
She's first lady

The monkey's clapping the monkey talks
Never throw bananas on the side walk

The sunrise in the morning
It's a little low for a September day
She goes walking
A little high for mid July
And she steps out in the pooring rain
She's first lady

The monkey's clapping the monkey talks
Oh lala oh mymy

She's the talk of the block
Shes walking the talk

songs.name: The Pretentious Dickhead, take II
songs.lyrics:
There's a stone and I know won't be long before you take it away from me
There's a stone, my eyes see gold. But I know you want me to be all alone
Maybe I'm blind. My songs should rhyme. I can't keep time when I record one by one

There's a throne in a glass dome. It's locked up tight not meant to be sat on by unquenched pride
My bones they're cold. Not yet old but soon I'll wish I decided I opened up more
Captain I'll try what they despise. To wander through Frownland would bring a tear to my eye
I laugh at my-- at my demise my hearts on the table for all to make fun of

songs.name: Aluminum Pirates
songs.lyrics:
Take your garbage bags and empty them out on the floor
Ten cents per bottle plastic or glass
Split the treasures equally amongst our brothers
Share the wealth, share the wealth
We will not succumb to the greed which puppetteers the bastards who demand we work like slaves
We collect the riches that were thrown away

Yoho yoho its a wanderer's life for we
Sleep in a tent
Don't pay rent
Don't own a cent every day is like a camping trip
We're your new family
My old one left me

Yoho yoho boy is nature sure great
Lots of vitamin D from being outside all day
You don't need to say please, buying drugs is a breeze
Yoho yoho its a wanderer's life for we
Sleep in a tent
Don't pay rent
Don't own a cent every day is like a camping trip
We're your new family
My old one left me

Have you seen the little one whoes run away to never again dream
(Have you seen the little one whoes gone and now he's fallen into a dream)

He wont cry anymore sans responsibilite
(No he'll never cry anymore the world is make believe)

So throw aside your former life we want you just the way you are
A seadog's life you're sure to find is the free-est but not the cleanest

Take your garbage bags and empty them out on the floor
Ten cents per bottle plastic or glass
Split the treasures equally amongst our brothers
Share the wealth, share the wealth
We will not succumb to the greed which puppetteers the bastards who demand we work like slaves
We collect the riches that were thrown away

songs.name: The Great Pinecone Fight
songs.lyrics:
Uncle Colin came out racing
To greet us at the door
He bent down to pick up a pinecone
I had no idea what was in store
He chucked it at my brother and I
At first I was confused
'Till my brother threw one right back at him
Now a war was about to insue

Pinecones in my eyes
Got welts on my arms and forehead
It hurts I wont lie
Brother we cant be defeated

I lay in grandpa's driveway
We lost out bravest soldier tonight

Oh brother Sean, you can't give in we nearly won the fight
His outstreched arm brings me back to life
A barage flys through the sky
And I stand up, take aim, ready to attack
My pinecone hits him square in the back
He hit the floor
The battle's won
A victory cry, my brother and I are glorious
The brothers cheered
While Colin sighed
You won this round but I will get you back next time
He hit the floor
The battle's won
A victory cry, my brother and I are glorious

Come next Christmas dinner
There he stands again
The gleem in his eye tells me
He wont go easy this time
The three of us start pelting each other with pinecones
Until we're called for supper
Weaving in between the cars in the driveway
It's the greatest pinecone battle of all time

songs.name: El Mascara Rojo's medly
songs.lyrics:
So come all ye lovers
Bare my tale today
I go by El Mascara Rojo
May I amuse you with these songs of mine
Join me in life celebration

As the skyscrapers grow taller
Our Human ways won't change
So come gather 'round the fire
And share tales of yesterday

On Wreck beach
We are the people
Here we scream
For all men equal
Beat the drum

I think of ritual parties
Dance through nature's flow
Cast away all your sorrows
Let your troubles go

Watching us stand the trees
Through midnight's darkness
I will breathe the ways of our old ones
So come share a drink and laugh 'till you cry now
Be showered in stars and blessed by the moon
Cook all your hunt over the fire
And squint as the smoke burns holes in your eyes

Gaze at her majesty
And her cloudy veil
The sun shines like halo
So I know she's the one
Lord knows I'd never've found her on my own
Lord knows I'd run away from anything too good for me

I used to abuse your name to excuse my ill mind
Which sent me on a false quest for a joy impossible to find
But now I've grown and I know better then to blame everything on the divine
Now I've grown and I can shape my own life
And forget how I hurt myself years ago

As I gaze out on the ocean, you appear
In the rays from the sun
It's always been the sign I made to know you're here
No, not anymore

I remember feeling less than human
But that was never the case
I fret over the bigger questions nobody else could handle
Why, that'd make anyone insane

And I used to sing

Do you happen to know where my humanity's gone?
Did god create man or man create

songs.name: Shoogiedoobap
songs.lyrics:
Ladies and gentlemen, have you ever listened to a song where the lyrics are just complete fucking gibberish?
Well, this song is about that

Let's all do the shoogiedoobap 
Let's all do the shoogiedoobap 
Let's all do the shoogiedoobap 
Brother, get up on that stage about me how you shoogiedoobap your baptabadatdaa

Ob li di ob li da
Di doo doo doo di da da da
Bai ya ya
Hyperbolicsyllabicsesquedalymistic

Let's all do the shoogiedoobap 
Let's all do the shoogiedoobap 
Let's all do the shoogiedoobap

songs.name: Okanagan Vineyards
songs.lyrics:
When the sun set in Narmada, that's when the storm blew away
Now it hasn't rained for five short years, and the crops are far past decayed
But I'm grateful to that burning ball of passion in the sky
Now I can get better and playing the strings because my throat is dry

Oh no I don't ever wish for it rain again
I don't pray for the Storm
Or the lighting strike
Or the wind blow down the trees

Today I saw a tear rolled down mother nature's cheek
I stopped and stuck out my tongue to catch a drop
It both tasted and smelled like an oil painting of Aphrodite
Being birthed from the ocean's sea foam green
When the clouds faded to bright blue sky I never felt more relieved
Now the Okanagan vineyards can return to their idle peace
I hope I never hear the rain drops laugh against the pavement
Sure all the water sounds nice now, but it wont while it's happening

Oh no I don't, ever wish for it rain again
I don't pray for the Storm
Or the lighting strike
Or the wind blow
Oh this drought is gonna get the best of me

songs.name: ROLL
songs.lyrics:
I climbed a mountian just to get here
I've slain a thousand dragons in these short years
And alas I have nothing to share it for
And alas I have no proof
so I hide in my shell
I will die undiscovered
Why even try? for the sake of myself and no one else

Its been too long since I've last seen a woman like you
The promise of forever I cannot bestow upon you
It's for myself that I must keep rolling the bones
Who am I? least of my worries
Why even try? crush my enemies
It's cold outside. I stand proud in the nude

Who am I? least of my worries
Why even try? crush my enemies
It's cold outside. I stand proud, those young scrubs can't critisize me now
All this time I've been so lonley
All this time then I found you
All this time I didn't know
All this time that you were the one I needed
All this time
All this time

Roll away with me
Im gonna roll

songs.name: Door Dogs
songs.lyrics:
And there by the door under your feet a dog I did not know
I said hey, did you follow us home? have you seen him before? Your confusion told me
All that I needed to know

I already know what comes next, but dont be upset he'll get you there safe
Charon, the ferries await. This poor dog's day has finally come
All of the seeds have been grown

And there your confusion told me that you could not see the dog in the door

songs.name: Whim
songs.lyrics:
She through out my door
She slept on my floor
She drank all my beer
But I kinda llike it, I get excited
When she starts knocking it feels so good

Time is a concept to fear us away from never not sleeping, created to enslave
But it's colde now
Im getting older now, or at least I'd like to believe

I can't sing like Blue-eyes
The high art's not my size
Still he keeps climbing, pushing the boulder
Roll'er back over to start all again

Whoes lyrics need meaning
Your thoughts arn't endeering
You're just pretentious, go get a job

I'd like to see Venice one day, but who knows?
Maybe I'll sooner roll over or go with the flow
Stress does not exist
Unless you let it
SO don't waste your time judging me

songs.name: Vaccum Chamber
songs.lyrics:
If I could live in a vaccum chamber
If I wouldn't fill my lungs with hatred
but as time moves I think about the people not here
If I could let my friends go
If time would stop I'd have not motivation
Why do I wish my life not slow
It's better this than a trip and fall into old age

If I could live in a vaccum chamber
If I could stay in this moment forever
To hault the decay of every living thing's bones
If I could lay here next to you
I promise that I wouldnt dare think to touch you
You dont need reason to give love
Predicting other peoples thoughts, you'll never know what they really want

Dont say it's over
All my blood
Just to never have to move out from under the sun
Why do I contradict myself the markings from the belt they wont fade away
But as time moves I think of the poele not here

If I could live in a vaccum chamber
If I could roll over without ever tasting failure

songs.name: Jade Jules
songs.lyrics:
Let me tell ya bout Jade Jules
I wanna hear you sing
I wanna hear you sing me a song, you cannot go wrong

I bought her trademark perfume
I'll sniff it all night long
I'll smell it while I sing to myself all day and night long

I think you caught me loose in the winter scrounging for a dinner cruisin just to find a new sound
I'll never write one, nope, I'll never find one
Stuck seeing jade in my head

She cooks I eat
SHe cooks I eat
she cooks I eat
she cooks I eat
she cooks I eat
never full

songs.name: Ulysses
songs.lyrics:
Hark! cried the sailor, land blooms on her horizon
Mother Gaia has left wonders for us mortal men to strive for
Her full forests and thick thickets stand between us and a bounty of overflowing treasure we swore our lives to seek
Yet in the chest was but a map to a new adventure somewhere. Load the ship and set sail again for a new goose to find
Wind pours into the ocean and forward we blast off. To fall for her tricks again will reward us as long as we never yield

songs.name: Professor Plum
songs.lyrics:
Have you ever had a dream you swore had a deeper meaning
I've been studying my day visions for many years now
Past the kalediscope of colours I think I found a deeper answer
Its that Decartes' brain's in a vat
You cant prove you're up to bat
And the rules you thought that are there never were

What you call memories were a child's imagination
Yet you ate up every spoonful they fed to you
So what the hell is all this nature I see around me
All that requires no explination can easily be observed
Because Decartes' brain's in a vat
You cant prove you're up to bat
And the rules you thought that are there never were

So I'm tearing down parliment for my freedom
To awake from this groovy dream which I'm stuck inside of
Your logic fails to hold itself
For you cant prove what you never felt
So why uphold a citizen
Your master is whoever you give way
So why follow a leader
He doesn't know himself either
They're all only there because of someone else's label

So I wont abide by your systems, you can never make me
Because Decartes' brain's in a vat
You cant prove you're up to bat
And the rules you thought that are there never were

songs.name: Life is Simple
songs.lyrics:
Take my waves
Take it all
You wont rememeber
When the hands fall
That's all they are
Let the light in
Vibrations and abstract mechanics
Rule over our being

You forgot the world is simple
Well I don't blame you
A fantasy to hold importance
Is too good to be true

Trust's a sugestion
To the electric steak
Yet we build molehills
To some higher plane
That's all they are
Let my waves in
Vibrations and magic
Decide what is sin

You forgot the world is simple if you read it the right way
A warm embrace from the force of nothing
Should not result in fear

The shouts from the fire are okay
And the years of silence are not in vein

songs.name: Song for my Son
songs.lyrics:
Promise me to make memories
And get into lots of trouble just dont tell your mum
Always be grateful for what you have
Don't make the same mistakes I did in my past

Treat your schoolmates like your brothers and your sisters
Theres never too much love to go around
Don't believe the rumours and form your own opinions
Because we're all just people in the end

You will feel blue somtimes I know
As often as I'm sure time will feel slow
When looking back at it all everything feels so small
Life is what you make it so please dont make it dull

I may not be the most well worded man
My feelings never made it past my head
And never feel suffocated walking through this zoo
And despite what I don't say I love you
And despite what I dont' say I love you

footer.credits: All songs written, produced, and performed by Sean Endo. All artwork-- other than hero image-- created by Sean Endo
